ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy data entry */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter associated with the energy data */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the data was recorded */,
  "t_sec" INTEGER /* Time in seconds for the data entry */,
  "P1_kW" REAL /* Active power from meter 1 in kW */,
  "Q1_kvar" REAL /* Reactive power from meter 1 in kvar */,
  "P2_kW" REAL /* Active power from meter 2 in kW */,
  "Q2_kvar" REAL /* Reactive power from meter 2 in kvar */,
  "P3_kW" REAL /* Active power from meter 3 in kW */,
  "Q3_kvar" REAL /* Reactive power from meter 3 in kvar */,
  "P4_kW" REAL /* Active power from meter 4 in kW */,
  "Q4_kvar" REAL /* Reactive power from meter 4 in kvar */,
  "energy_consumption_kWh" REAL /* Calculated energy consumption in kWh */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES energy_meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_meters" (
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meter */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the meter */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the meter was installed */,
  "meter_type" TEXT /* Type of meter (e.g., Smart, Analog) */,
  "meter_model" TEXT /* Model of the meter */,
  "meter_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the meter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user logging into the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Energy Manager, Technician) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., High Usage, Low Efficiency) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (resolved or unresolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year for which the report is generated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the report */,
  "total_kWh" REAL /* Total energy consumed in kWh for the month */,
  "total_kvarh" REAL /* Total reactive energy in kvarh for the month */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_efficiency_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the efficiency measurement */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the efficiency measurement */,
  "efficiency_score" REAL /* Calculated efficiency score for the month */,
  "target_score" REAL /* Target efficiency score set by the organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter associated with the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., Temperature, Humidity) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sensor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES energy_meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter associated with the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES energy_meters ("meter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technician was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technician was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the energy provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy provider */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Contract start date with the provider */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* Contract end date with the provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the forecast */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year for which the forecast is generated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the forecast */,
  "forecasted_kWh" REAL /* Forecasted energy consumption in kWh for the month */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the estimate */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year for which the estimate is generated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the estimate */,
  "estimated_kWh" REAL /* Estimated energy consumption in kWh for the month */,
  "estimate_date" TEXT /* Date when the estimate was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the estimate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the estimate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id")
)
